expression.expression: ((coalesce(in0.PRODUCT_NAME, in1.PRODUCT_NAME, in2.PRODUCT_NAME) = in3.PRODUCT_NAME) AND (coalesce(in0.COUNTRY_NAME, in1.COUNTRY_NAME, in2.COUNTRY_NAME) = in3.COUNTRY_NAME))

warehouseQuery.query:
SELECT app_country_id
       , country_name
       , country_abbreviation
       , product_name
       , parent_app_country_id
       , is_static
       , is_active
 FROM gpdip_prd.gpdip_uddl_regulatory.pfleet_country
WHERE  is_active = 1

expression.expression: ((coalesce(in0.PRODUCT_NAME, in1.PRODUCT_NAME, in2.PRODUCT_NAME) = in3.PRODUCT_NAME) AND (coalesce(in0.COUNTRY_NAME, in1.COUNTRY_NAME, in2.COUNTRY_NAME) = in3.COUNTRY_NAME))

condition.expression: ((NOT (NOT (PARENT_APP_COUNTRY_ID IS NULL))) OR ((NOT (PARENT_APP_COUNTRY_ID IS NULL)) IS NULL))
